ddls:
CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target (medication or treatment) being analyzed */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outcome (disease or condition) being analyzed */,
  "comparator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparator (control group or baseline) being used */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "research_question" TEXT /* Research question being addressed by the analysis */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Study design used in the analysis */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source used in the analysis */,
  "analysis_protocol" TEXT /* Analysis protocol or methodology used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_comparator_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparator_id") REFERENCES comparators ("comparator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target (e.g., medication, treatment) */,
  "target_classification" TEXT /* Classification of the target (e.g., medication, treatment, device) */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Description of the target */,
  "target_synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms for the target */,
  "mechanism_of_action" TEXT /* Mechanism of action of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of the outcome (e.g., disease, condition) */,
  "outcome_classification" TEXT /* Classification of the outcome (e.g., disease, condition, symptom) */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms for the outcome */,
  "severity_scale" TEXT /* Severity scale of the outcome (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparators" (
  "comparator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparator */,
  "comparator_name" TEXT /* Name of the comparator */,
  "comparator_type" TEXT /* Type of the comparator (e.g., control group, baseline) */,
  "comparator_classification" TEXT /* Classification of the comparator (e.g., control group, baseline) */,
  "comparator_description" TEXT /* Description of the comparator */,
  "comparator_synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms for the comparator */,
  "characteristics" TEXT /* Characteristics of the comparator (e.g., demographic, clinical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nestings" (
  "nesting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nesting */,
  "nesting_name" TEXT /* Name of the nesting */,
  "nesting_type" TEXT /* Type of the nesting (e.g., stratum, subgroup) */,
  "nesting_classification" TEXT /* Classification of the nesting (e.g., stratum, subgroup) */,
  "nesting_description" TEXT /* Description of the nesting */,
  "nesting_synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms for the nesting */,
  "characteristics" TEXT /* Characteristics of the nesting (e.g., demographic, clinical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nesting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis that produced the result */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the result (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "result_interpretation" TEXT /* Interpretation of the result */,
  "statistical_significance" INTEGER /* Statistical significance of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mdrr_targets" (
  "mdrr_target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MDrr value */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target (medication or treatment) */,
  "mdrr_value" REAL /* MDrr value for the target */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the MDrr value */,
  "statistical_significance" INTEGER /* Statistical significance of the MDrr value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mdrr_target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mdrr_targets_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mdrr_comparators" (
  "mdrr_comparator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MDrr value */,
  "comparator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparator (control group or baseline) */,
  "mdrr_value" REAL /* MDrr value for the comparator */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the MDrr value */,
  "statistical_significance" INTEGER /* Statistical significance of the MDrr value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mdrr_comparator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mdrr_comparators_comparator_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparator_id") REFERENCES comparators ("comparator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strata" (
  "stratum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stratum */,
  "stratum_name" TEXT /* Name of the stratum */,
  "stratum_type" TEXT /* Type of the stratum (e.g., demographic, clinical) */,
  "stratum_classification" TEXT /* Classification of the stratum (e.g., demographic, clinical) */,
  "stratum_description" TEXT /* Description of the stratum */,
  "stratum_synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms for the stratum */,
  "characteristics" TEXT /* Characteristics of the stratum (e.g., age, sex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stratum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_rr_values" (
  "log_rr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log RR value */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis that produced the log RR value */,
  "log_rr_value" REAL /* Log RR value */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the log RR value */,
  "statistical_significance" INTEGER /* Statistical significance of the log RR value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_rr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_rr_values_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of the method (e.g., cohort, case-control) */,
  "method_classification" TEXT /* Classification of the method (e.g., cohort, case-control) */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms for the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparative" (
  "comparative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparative analysis */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis that produced the comparative value */,
  "comparative_type" TEXT /* Type of the comparative analysis (e.g., head-to-head, indirect) */,
  "comparative_description" TEXT /* Description of the comparative analysis */,
  "comparative_interpretation" TEXT /* Interpretation of the comparative analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparative_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nesting_results" (
  "nesting_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nesting result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis that produced the nesting result */,
  "nesting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nesting structure used */,
  "nesting_value" INTEGER /* Nesting value (True or False) */,
  "nesting_description" TEXT /* Description of the nesting result */,
  "nesting_interpretation" TEXT /* Interpretation of the nesting result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nesting_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nesting_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "first_exposure" (
  "first_exposure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each first exposure analysis */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis that produced the first exposure value */,
  "first_exposure_value" INTEGER /* First exposure value (True or False) */,
  "first_exposure_description" TEXT /* Description of the first exposure result */,
  "first_exposure_interpretation" TEXT /* Interpretation of the first exposure result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("first_exposure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_first_exposure_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "database_type" TEXT /* Type of the database (e.g., relational, NoSQL) */,
  "database_classification" TEXT /* Classification of the database (e.g., relational, NoSQL) */,
  "database_description" TEXT /* Description of the database */,
  "database_synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms for the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration value */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis that produced the calibration value */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Calibration value */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the calibration value */,
  "statistical_significance" INTEGER /* Statistical significance of the calibration value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibrations_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_errors" (
  "calibration_error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration error value */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis that produced the calibration error value */,
  "calibration_error_value" REAL /* Calibration error value */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the calibration error value */,
  "statistical_significance" INTEGER /* Statistical significance of the calibration error value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_errors_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)
